title: Domain Evidence Schema V1
description: Meta-schema for Project Lumina domain evidence declarations. Each domain module's evidence-schema.json must conform to this schema. See standards/domain-evidence-extension-v1.md for the authoritative specification.

schema_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this evidence schema declaration. Format: lumina:evidence:{domain-name}:v{major}

version.description: Semantic version of this evidence schema declaration.

domain_id.description: The domain physics ID this schema belongs to. Must match the domain-physics 'id' field.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this evidence schema captures.

fields.description: Map of field_name to a JSON Schema fragment describing that field. Universal base fields (response_latency_sec, off_task_ratio) MAY be included here for completeness but are always valid regardless. Field names beginning with underscore (_) are reserved for system use.

propertyNames.description: Field names must be lowercase snake_case and must not start with an underscore.

additionalProperties.description: A JSON Schema fragment describing the field. At minimum, 'type' should be specified.
